# Vivek Chand Kuduva Devadoss

> AI Engineering Leader and open-source founder. Based in Amsterdam, Netherlands. Tech Lead at Booking.com. Building at the intersection of AI, developer tooling, and EdTech.

## About

Vivek is a software engineer and founder with 13+ years of experience. He leads AI/ML initiatives at Booking.com — driving LLM accuracy from 60% to 95%+, building evaluation frameworks used across 15,000+ agents, generating €35M annual impact. He also builds open-source tools and consumer AI products.

## Projects

### ClawMetry
Open-source real-time observability dashboard for OpenClaw AI agents. Think Grafana for LLM pipelines in production. 40,000+ installs worldwide. Ranked #5 on Product Hunt launch day (above everything except Claude Sonnet 4.6).
- URL: https://clawmetry.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/vivekchand/clawmetry
- Tech: Python, Next.js, WebSocket, PyPI

### VedicVoice
AI-powered Sanskrit and Vedic text digital library with native TTS narration (custom AI4Bharat voices). 12+ ancient texts digitized including Upanishads and Yoga Sutras.
- URL: https://vedicvoice.app
- Tech: Next.js, Express, PostgreSQL, Google Cloud Run

### InburgeringAI
AI-powered Dutch citizenship (inburgering) exam preparation tool for immigrants in the Netherlands.
- URL: https://inburgeringai.nl

### Zenor
AI recruitment and Shopify AI-visibility audit tools.
- URL: https://zenor.ai

### Judge LLM Evaluation Framework (Booking.com)
Production framework for automated LLM output evaluation using judge model approach. Replaced manual quality assessment, achieving 7x faster iteration cycles.

## Experience

- **Booking.com** — Tech Lead / Senior Software Engineer (Jan 2020 — Present, Amsterdam). Led AI/CS initiatives: Text Summarisation (60% to 95%+ accuracy), Intelligent Voice Assistant, CS Co-Pilot, Automated Quality Evaluation. €35M annual impact.
- **ClassKlap (Eupheus Learning)** — Lead Engineer. EdTech platform serving 500,000+ students across India.
- **Recruiterbox (now JazzHR)** — Early Engineer (#3). Built core product from ground up.

## Education

B.E. Computer Science, Dr. Ambedkar Institute of Technology, Bangalore (2007–2011)
